dept_gcc_region_desc: Greater Chennai Corporation regions, the top-level administrative division with 3 regions covering the city.
dept_gcc_zone_desc: GCC administrative zones, each headed by a Zonal Officer overseeing ward-level services.
dept_gcc_ward_desc: GCC wards with elected councillors responsible for local civic issues. 200 wards as per 2022 delimitation.
dept_cmwssb_dae_fullform: CMWSSB (Chennai Metropolitan Water Supply and Sewerage Board)
dept_cmwssb_dae_desc: CMWSSB District Assistant Engineer areas managing local water supply and sewerage infrastructure.
dept_cmwssb_depot_desc: CMWSSB depots for local water supply complaints, maintenance and service delivery.
dept_election_ac_desc: Assembly constituencies electing Members of Legislative Assembly to the Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly.
dept_election_pc_desc: Parliamentary constituencies electing Members of Parliament to the Lok Sabha.
dept_admin_district_desc: Revenue district headed by the District Collector for general administration.
dept_admin_taluk_desc: Taluks headed by Tahsildars for revenue collection and land administration.
dept_pincode_desc: Postal PIN code areas served by India Post offices.
